name: Dryvebox Omaha
about: Dryvebox Omaha is a mobile golf simulator service that brings state-of-the-art, climate-controlled golf studios powered by TrackMan technology directly to any location. The company offers three primary form factors: a mobile trailer, an indoor enclosure, and a putting green setup. All configurations include premium golf clubs, balls, and TrackMan technology, providing access to over 400 famous golf courses. The service is designed to be a turnkey solution for various events, handling setup, operation, and staffing to provide a stress-free experience for the client.
why_golfers_like_it: Convenient mobile service that brings professional golf simulation to any location
Access to TrackMan technology for accurate swing and ball data analysis
Climate-controlled environment ensures playability in any weather
Variety of event configurations, from small parties to large corporate gatherings

food_and_drink.notes: BYOB (Bring Your Own Beverage) is implied, as no food service is mentioned.
BYOB (Bring Your Own Beverage) is implied, as no bar service is mentioned.

simulator_hardware.notes: Primary simulator technology used across all form factors.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, Dryvebox provides all necessary equipment, including clubs and balls.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, you can bring your own food and beverages. The setup includes a party deck and televisions to enjoy.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: While not explicitly stated, typical simulator rounds can take 1-2 hours depending on the pace of play and group size.

faq.question: Is Dryvebox kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Dryvebox is kid-friendly and offers fun games and activities for children, making it suitable for family events and birthday parties.
